data.current_description: Provisions a new queue manager in the MQ on Cloud service
data.description_suggestion: Provisions a new queue manager in the MQ on Cloud service instance. Accepts configuration parameters via CloudQueueManagerCreate schema including name, size, and other settings. Returns a CloudQueueManager object with the newly created queue manager details and a unique queueManagerId. The operation is asynchronous and returns HTTP 202 Accepted; use getCloudQueueManagerStatus to monitor provisioning progress.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about input parameters, response structure, and asynchronous nature. Added information about the request schema, response object, HTTP 202 status code, and guidance on monitoring provisioning status to improve AI agent interpretability.
